meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code Skills for Debugging Success
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code setup to eliminate debugging bottlenecks. Learn professional workflows using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver client projects faster.
content.answer_block: To eliminate debugging bottlenecks, integrate Claude Code with your IDE to automate root-cause analysis. By leveraging context-aware prompts in Antigravity, you can force the AI to map dependencies and trace logic errors instantly, effectively turning hours of manual troubleshooting into a streamlined, automated workflow that boosts your delivery speed.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking on your client delivery, and you are staring at a cryptic stack trace that refuses to resolve. Every minute spent chasing a ghost in the machine is a minute stolen from your bottom line. You aren't just a coder; you are a solution architect, and debugging shouldn't be the bottleneck that breaks your project timeline.

The industry standard has shifted. By mastering Claude Code in tandem with Antigravity, you move from reactive patching to proactive engineering. This isn't just about fixing bugs; it's about building a repeatable, high-velocity system that makes your code bulletproof before the client even hits 'refresh'.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Configure your project workspace to provide Claude Code with full read access to your codebase while maintaining strict architectural boundaries.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project structure and create a dependency map that highlights potential circular references or common failure points.

steps.title: Contextual Error Injection
steps.description: Feed specific stack traces into the workflow to isolate the failing module without dumping unnecessary noise.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify the logic branch causing this trace: [PASTE_TRACE]. Suggest a refactor for better error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Review the logic in [FILE_PATH] and identify why this exception is throwing.'

steps.title: Unit Test Automation
steps.description: Generate automated tests for the identified bug to ensure the fix is verified and regression-proof.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Jest unit test that reproduces the bug identified in the previous step and verifies the fix.

steps.title: Dependency Audit
steps.description: Use AI-driven auditing to ensure that your debugging efforts haven't introduced side effects in external packages.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit recent dependency updates for breaking changes that might conflict with our current implementation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Check for potential version conflicts in package.json affecting the failing module.'

steps.title: Final Implementation Sync
steps.description: Commit your resolved code and generate documentation for the client to explain the fix clearly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a concise technical summary of the fix for the client's change log.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit -m 'feat: resolved runtime error in [MODULE] and added regression tests'

pro_tips: Always set a 'system prompt' in Claude Code that defines your preferred coding standard (e.g., Airbnb style guide) to ensure consistent output.
Use Antigravity to generate 'TODO' comments in your code that Claude Code can automatically pick up during the next sprint.
When facing complex bugs, ask Claude Code to explain the code as if it were teaching a junior dev; this often reveals the logic flaw instantly.
Pipe your build logs directly into Claude Code's terminal interface to allow the model to suggest fixes in real-time as the build fails.
Use the 'diff' feature in Claude Code to review proposed changes line-by-line, preventing the model from over-writing critical configurations.
content.next_steps: Integrate Claude Code into your CI/CD pipeline to automate initial debugging passes before code reaches your review queue.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start scaling your output. Our community is packed with senior engineers sharing workflows that save 10+ hours a week. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
